cost_thresholds._comment: Tune per-workspace. Defaults err on the side of surfacing. Lower thresholds = more findings per run.

model_cost_table._comment: Cost per million tokens (input + output blended). Used to project savings on model-downgrade recommendations. Override with your contracted rates if different. Sources: published Anthropic + OpenAI pricing pages as of 2026.
model_cost_table._units: USD per million tokens, blended input/output (rough; the recommender's projections are approximate by design — operators should not treat them as billing-grade)

model_downgrade_rules._comment: If an agent uses a model in expensive_models AND has avg_output_tokens < haiku_threshold AND has at least min_runs_for_downgrade completed runs in 30d AND its bot manifest doesn't declare thinkLevel: high, recommend a downgrade to preferred_haiku_model (Anthropic) or preferred_mini_model (OpenAI). Tune haiku_threshold up if quality regresses on simple tasks.

company_glossary.model_cost_table: Per-million-token cost estimates by model. Used by the recommender to project monthly savings on downgrade recommendations.
company_glossary.overspec_candidate: Agent using an expensive model (Sonnet, Opus, GPT-5) with consistently low output tokens — Haiku-tier would suffice without quality regression.
company_glossary.runaway_agent: Agent with high run rate AND high failure rate. Likely retry-looping; pausing prevents the loop from amplifying cost.
company_glossary.stale_agent: Agent enabled but with zero runs in 30 days. Either disable or investigate why its trigger isn't firing.
company_glossary.schedule_mismatch: Agent firing more frequently than the data change rate of its entityTypesRead — wasted runs that produce 'no new records' findings.
